---
name: Theological Disagreement
about: Disagreement with how a theologically-contested reading was resolved
title: "[THEOLOGICAL] <verse reference>: <brief concern>"
labels: theological, verse-feedback
assignees: ''
---

## Verse

Reference: (e.g., Galatians 2:16)
Canonical ID: (optional)

## Contested reading

What interpretive question is at stake? (e.g., "pistis Christou —
'faith in Christ' subjective genitive vs. 'faithfulness of Christ'
objective genitive")

## Current resolution

How does the Cartha Translation currently render this? What alternative
is preserved in the footnote (if any)?

## Proposed resolution

What rendering would you prefer? Should the alternative be elevated to
main text, with the current rendering footnoted?

## Doctrinal commitments

Which doctrinal commitments from DOCTRINE.md bear on this question?
Do you believe the current rendering is inconsistent with our stated
commitments, or do you disagree with a stated commitment?

## References

Scholars, commentaries, or theological traditions that support your
proposed resolution.

## Related verses

Does this decision have implications for other verses in the translation?
List verses that should be revisited if this resolution changes.
